components.name: Primary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #ffffff; color: #000000; padding: 12px 24px; border-radius: 6px; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: 14px; border: none; transition: all 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); cursor: pointer; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #e5e5e5; transform: translateY(-1px); }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: #737373; padding: 12px 24px; border-radius: 6px; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: 14px; border: 1px solid #262626; transition: all 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); cursor: pointer; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { border-color: #404040; color: #ffffff; transform: translateY(-1px); }

narrative.northStar: The Magnificent Vault / The Sovereign Terminal
narrative.overview: Fuego Bank's visual system balances the grandeur of high-end luxury with the raw precision of a technical terminal.

rules.name: The Rarity Rule
rules.body: The Fuego Fire accent (#ff4500) must occupy ≤10% of any view.

dos: Do use Orbitron strictly for primary section headings.
Do use DM Mono for all technical stats, numbers, and mechanism details.
Do center section labels and headings.
donts: Don't use Childish sci-fi fonts like Audiowide or Chakra Petch.
Don't use gradient text or neon glow effects on body copy.
